description:
The person going from a 0.99kd, to a 1.89kd in champ top 500 peak is crazy, below are the match ids, and suspected cheat spots.

Match 1 (Kanal) ID: 4a97f8ae-816b-434d-93e0-e0cc82a141bc
Match 2 (Outback) ID: 6f8a224e-b180-4149-b1fc-6f44fb9dd3b9
Match 3 (Chalet) ID: 86b8c6ab-1bd0-433b-b9d5-fafbc879239b

Match 1 (Kanal), round 4 as Doc. This is the round that it basically shows it all...
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Match 2 (Outback), round 2 as Azami. Pre-aims drone and gets a weird spawn peek kill.
Match 2 (Outback), round 4 as Ash. Runs into games, knows Lesion is in corner of Kitchen. Pre-aims Lesions head later on.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Match 3 (Chalet), round 1 as Azami. He pre-aims and pre-fires Blackbeard behind Fireplace.
Match 3 (Chalet), round 3 as Mira. This kill at the beginning of the round at main door wasn't that sus, but the reaction time was a little crazy.
Match 3 (Chalet), round 4 as Amaru. This whole round also shows it, pre-aiming people through walls. Just knowing where they are in general.

description: He tried to kill me in ranked without having any information about my position. It's clearly visible from the replay that he was using wallhacks because he tried to shooting through a hard wall while I was behind it. From his POV, it always seemed like he was looking slightly upwards when one level down to see what's happening above. It was also evident that their team was informed about our positions because everyone was running around the map as if they knew exactly where we were, sprinting through those areas.
